key.name: vcp-code
key.description: The VCP code for brightness control. Default is 10 (Brightness).

key.name: step
key.description: The amount to increase/decrease brightness per key press (1-20).

key.name: link-displays
key.description: Link brightness of all displays so they move together.

key.name: brightness-up
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to increase brightness on all displays.

key.name: brightness-down
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to decrease brightness on all displays.
